_comment: Pipeline and routing config for the OpenClaw orchestrator.

routing._comment: Smart model routing rules. Evaluated in order — first match wins.

pipelines._comment: Multi-agent workflows. Each step receives the output of the previous step.

build-feature.description: Full feature pipeline: interpret → code → review

steps.instruction: You are step 1 of 3 in a build-feature pipeline. Interpret the user request and write a clear technical specification: what needs to be built, inputs, outputs, edge cases. Be concise. Your output will be passed to the coder agent.

research-and-summarize.description: Research a topic and produce a structured summary

steps.instruction: You are step 1 of 2. Research the following topic and collect key facts, perspectives, and open questions. Be thorough.

debug-and-fix.description: Diagnose a bug then fix it

steps.instruction: You are step 1 of 2. Diagnose the bug in the code/error below. Identify root cause and explain it clearly. Do not fix yet.

local-first.description: Try local model first, escalate to cloud if result is poor

steps.instruction: Answer the following question as best you can. If you are not confident or the question requires deep reasoning, end your response with the tag: [ESCALATE]
The local model flagged this as needing escalation. Please provide a thorough answer to the original question.

scaling._comment: Load monitoring thresholds. Scaling here means model routing — not process spawning.
